attributes.Sql Query:

/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
,WPTL.DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SOL_NUM
,WPTL.MAGIC_KEY_ID
,WPTL.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG 
,WPTL.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WPTL.IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG

 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
,WPTL.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,WPTL.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,WPTL.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE  WPTL
 WHERE
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL 
WHERE NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE =WPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE)
